title: 10 health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum (star-of-bethlehem)
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. These medicinal properties can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin infections by reducing inflammation and preventing infection. Additionally, the plant's anti-irritant properties can soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. For example, a topical application of star-of-bethlehem can help speed up wound healing and reduce scarring, improving overall skin health and appearance.
